summary: Iteration-2 testing of UMKM Sarapan covering PUT /api/mitra cascade, dashboard setoran fields, Bearer-token iframe fallback, plus frontend Edit-Mitra / Edit-Product / Transaction-Detail-modal flows. Backend: 26/26 pytest passing (4 new tests for PUT /api/mitra cascade+duplicate+404, Bearer-only auth without cookies, and setoran_mitra/total_setoran in /api/dashboard/today). Frontend: Verified end-to-end on live preview URL — login persists access_token to localStorage (key 'sarapan_access_token'), Bearer fetch to /api/auth/me succeeds after clearing cookies (iframe fix confirmed), Mitra Edit dialog opens with prefilled name and 'Edit Mitra' title and persists changes, Product Edit dialog prefills (mitra/menu/jumlah/harga_mitra/harga_jual) and persists, Transaction Detail modal renders Tanggal/Mitra/Menu/Jumlah/Harga Dari Mitra/Harga Jual/Profit per Item/Setoran ke Mitra/Total Pendapatan/Total Profit/Dicatat pada with formatted Rupiah, Cetak Struk and Tutup buttons present. Dashboard Mitra Card now displays 'qty × harga_mitra' unit (e.g. '4 × Rp 10.000'), 'SETORAN MITRA Rp 40.000' as primary card total, then 'Pendapatan warung' and 'Profit warung' below — matches spec. #print-area positioned off-screen (left:-9999px) in normal viewport.

ui_bugs.issue: Pre-existing from iteration_1: occasional blank dashboard / CRA dev-error overlay due to 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' warning emitted by Recharts before container measures. Not a new regression. Still recommend a global window error-suppression for 'ResizeObserver loop' message in index.js or fixed-height wrapper around <ResponsiveContainer>.

Labels are 'Harga Dari Mitra' and 'Setoran ke Mitra' (test request asked literally for 'Harga Mitra' and 'Setoran Mitra'). Semantically equivalent and arguably clearer Indonesian; flag only for product-language consistency with dashboard card label which uses 'SETORAN MITRA'.

issues: New layout looks clean: red qty pill, line items with 'qty × Rp harga_mitra' and per-line profit, then bold SETORAN MITRA row, then Pendapatan warung & Profit warung. Good visual hierarchy.
Rupiah formatting, profit shown in green, clean two-column layout. Acceptable.

action_items: (carry-over from iteration_1) Suppress benign ResizeObserver warning in index.js to stop CRA dev-overlay engaging and blanking the dashboard on slow loads: window.addEventListener('error', e => { if (e.message && e.message.includes('ResizeObserver loop')) { e.stopImmediatePropagation(); e.preventDefault(); } });

OPTIONAL: Rename detail modal labels from 'Harga Dari Mitra' → 'Harga Mitra' and 'Setoran ke Mitra' → 'Setoran Mitra' to exactly match dashboard card terminology (only if product-team prefers strict consistency).
OPTIONAL: PUT /api/products does NOT cascade mitra_name change to historical transactions (already noted in iteration_1). PUT /api/mitra DOES cascade — verified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: PUT /api/mitra correctly cascades name to db.products and db.transactions; duplicate-name returns 400; missing id returns 404. Solid.
dashboard_today now returns total_setoran (per card) and setoran_mitra (per item) with math harga_mitra*jumlah_terjual; values verified in pytest and on UI.

Auth: access_token + refresh_token returned in body AND set as httpOnly cookies with SameSite=None+Secure — required for iframe. Bearer header fallback verified on backend; frontend stores token under 'sarapan_access_token' and api.js attaches Authorization header via interceptor. Iframe scenario will work.
CORS_ORIGINS with default '*' and allow_credentials=True is still spec-invalid; preview works because cookies use SameSite=None+Secure. Set explicit origins for prod.

Frontend api.js interceptor handles 401 by clearing token — appropriate. Mitra/Products use shared Dialog for create+edit distinguished by 'editing' state, title swap to 'Edit Mitra'/'Edit Produk' confirmed working.
Pre-existing Radix Dialog a11y warning (missing DialogDescription) still present on edit dialogs — low priority.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_umkm_api.py (extended: TestAuth.test_bearer_token_works_without_cookies; TestMitra.test_update_mitra_cascades_name_to_products_and_transactions, test_update_mitra_duplicate_name_400, test_update_mitra_not_found_404; TestDashboard.test_today_returns_metrics_and_cards now asserts total_setoran and setoran_mitra)

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all new features (Bearer fallback, Mitra Edit, Product Edit, Detail modal, new dashboard card layout, print-area hidden) verified end-to-end; only carryover blanking issue from Recharts overlay

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_/UI_ prefixed Mitra+Product+Transaction; cleaned up via API after run (admin cookie session DELETE). No leftover UI_/TEST_ mitra remain — verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_umkm_api.py -v (26 tests). All review-request items confirmed: PUT /api/mitra cascade, PUT /api/mitra 400 dup, dashboard total_setoran+setoran_mitra, Bearer-only auth, login body returns tokens. Frontend: localStorage key is 'sarapan_access_token' (NOT 'access_token'). Detail modal uses labels 'Harga Dari Mitra' / 'Setoran ke Mitra'. Recharts overlay still a flaky source of dashboard blank — workaround: hard refresh.
rca of the issue: No new bugs found. Iframe auth bug (previous) is now mitigated by (1) backend returning access_token in login response body and (2) frontend api.js attaching Authorization: Bearer header from localStorage; verified by clearing cookies in browser and successfully calling /api/auth/me with 200. Carry-over Recharts ResizeObserver overlay is the only flaky UX item — root cause and mitigation already documented in iteration_1.
